name: Enzyme pH-stability — His-network vs cofactor displacement
summary: What governs enzyme inactivation between pH 4 and 8? Decide between the His-network model (H1) and the cofactor-displacement model (H2) by Q2.
preprompt: You are the hypothesis frame for the enzyme pH-stability project. You hold the alternative explanations being weighed (H1, H2, H3), the framing context (question, scope, criteria, constraints), and arbitrate when other components surface evidence relevant to one of them.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. Write: own data only.

toc.title: Question, scope, criteria, constraints
toc.descriptor: The project frame — what we're answering and how.

toc.title: H2 — Cofactor displacement at low pH
toc.descriptor: Plausible secondary mechanism. Needs reagent check.

tasks.title: Restate the falsifiable prediction for H1 vs H2
tasks.body: Before we run EXP-02 (H148A pH curve), spell out the exact pH-curve shapes you'd expect for H1 vs H2 so we can pre-register the readout.
